Henry Cavill IGN Movies Interview (2011): At Comic-Con, Henry Cavill speaks with IGN Movies during the excitement surrounding his role as Superman in Man of Steel. Calm, focused, and aware of the responsibility, he discusses stepping into one of pop culture’s most recognizable symbols while fans wait to see him redefine Clark Kent for film. The interview captures a career turning point, with Cavill balancing gratitude, pressure, and confidence. Rather than presenting Superman as untouchable, Cavill emphasizes the humanity behind the cape, suggesting that the character’s strength comes as much from compassion as power. The moment becomes more than a promotional appearance; it shows an actor preparing to carry a legendary legacy with respect. Beneath the fanfare and superhero anticipation, the interview reflects ambition, discipline, and the challenge of becoming a modern cinematic icon.

𝙈𝙧_𝘼𝙧𝙘𝙖𝙣𝙪𝙢_𝙋𝙚𝙣𝙪𝙢𝙗𝙧𝙖~ sent an attachment.
🎬 Movie: Journey to the Center of the Earth ⭐ IMDb Rating: 5.8/10 🎭 Genre: Action, Adventure, Family, Sci-Fi 🎥 Director: Eric Brevig 📆 Release Year: 2008 Journey to the Center of the Earth is a fast-paced, visually vibrant family adventure that brings Jules Verne's classic sci-fi novel to life with a modern, high-tech twist. Directed by Eric Brevig, the film follows Trevor Anderson, a passionate but struggling volcanologist whose controversial theories have made him an outcast in the scientific community. His life takes an unexpected turn when his sullen teenage nephew, Sean, comes to stay with him, bringing along a box of belongings from Sean's missing father—Trevor's brother, Max, who vanished a decade earlier. What begins as a reluctant bonding trip to Iceland to investigate Max's cryptic notes quickly evolves into a perilous, rollercoaster-like descent into the unknown. Teaming up with a tough, pragmatic local mountain guide named Hannah, the trio becomes trapped in a volcanic cave-in and is forced to delve deeper into the Earth's crust. The central conflict balances lighthearted, theme-park-style thrills against a high-stakes fight for survival as they discover a breathtaking, subterranean "lost world" filled with bioluminescent birds, terrifying prehistoric sea monsters, and a vicious, rampaging Giganotosaurus. Cinematically, the film shines through its pioneering use of live-action 3D technology, crafting massive, CGI-heavy set pieces designed specifically to throw the audience directly into the heart of the action. Anchored by the charismatic, deeply endearing comedic timing of Brendan Fraser, alongside the youthful energy of Josh Hutcherson and the grounded presence of Anita Briem, Journey to the Center of the Earth delivers a purely fun, popcorn-cinema experience. It emphasizes the enduring thrill of discovery, the healing power of family bonds, and the beautiful realization that sometimes the most impossible stories are actually true. #JourneyToTheCenterOfTheEarth #BrendanFraser #SciFiAdventure

守多中國大病成全共喊出,今視小力,制機穿雲破霧,鷹擊長空,各類飛行動作一氣呵成~配上轟鳴聲,真的是視覺聽覺的雙重享受了。「不忘初心,亮劍長空期待和《長空之王》再次見面,再看一次「平凡航空人身上「不平凡的故事。#長空之王#王一博#胡軍#於適我們愛追劇 電影 劇資訊一刷預定! 《長空之王》9月3日重映還記得第一次看這部電影的時候,很多驚心動魄的場面都讓人「倒吸一口涼氣,沒想到馬上又能在影院二刷了影片。聚焦於鮮少出現在聚光燈前的空軍試飛員群體,揭開了新型戰機正式列裝前的誕生歷程。為了獲得準確數據,試飛員們需要一次次探索飛機的安全邊界和極限狀態,主動挑戰高風險科目,與死神過招,以血肉之軀挑戰冷冰冰的機械極限。此外,The air quality in Delhi and its adjoining regions improved to very poor category on Wednesday morning, with the AQI recorded at 349, according to the Central Pollution Control Board (CPCB). Smog looked to have cleared marginally, though some monitoring stations in the national capital recorded an AQI on the brink of severe zone. On Tuesday, Delhi was the second-most polluted city in India, with Noida part of the National Capital Region (NCR) - topping the list. The air quality in both cities dropped to severe category, with smog encompassing the cities, especially in the early morning hours. The 24-hour average AQI in Delhi was recorded at 412, whereas in Noida it was 77 26 426. #explore viralreelitfleetreel viralvideos 19 hours ago See translation當劇資訊|熱血再臨!《紅海行動》重映預告小第一次觀影時的緊張與壓迫仍歷歷在目,而現在,是時候再次體驗這場腎上腺素爆表的銀幕衝擊了!! Likes 影片聚焦中國海軍特戰小隊執行海外撤僑任務,從激烈巷戰到極限營救,節奏毫不留情,每一秒都充滿危險與犧牲。真實軍事裝備、硬核戰術呈現與高密度動作場面,讓戰爭的殘酷感撲面而來。爆炸震撼銀幕,槍聲直擊心臟一這不只是電影,而是一場沉浸式體驗。「和平,從來不是理所當然。」期待

𝚈𝚊𝚜𝚑𝚊𝚗𝚜𝚑

You sent an attachment.
Follow Now🙃… 🇯🇵 When this speed is reached, the ground is no longer moving, but moving forward at the speed of sound. What a kind of experience it is to ride a supersonic speed train across Japan. At present, the speed of Japan’s fastest train is about 320 km/hour, while a superfast magnetic suspension train Such as on an advanced experimental platform, a speed of more than 600 km/h has been achieved in a controlled environment. This simulation far exceeds the current level, exploring what possibilities the future will hold when the modern railway concept evolves into a true ultra-high-speed system. To reach such a speed, power alone is far from sufficient. Engineers are researching magnetic suspension technology, almost zero friction track, and Vacuum or low pressure pipeline systems, thereby eliminating the largest limiting factor in ultra-high-speed operation-air resistance. At speed at the speed of Mars, even the slightest air turbulence can pose a severe structural challenge. Therefore, the future ultra-high speed railway design will rely on high-precision guidance systems, stable technology of Al control, and infrastructure capable of producing millimeter-level errors within hundreds of kilometers. Once realized, journeys that now require several hours will be shortened to minutes, potentially fundamentally changing transportation patterns, regional economies, and connectivity between large cities. Do you like technology? Popular World Japan Economic Growth

𝚈𝚊𝚜𝚑𝚊𝚗𝚜𝚑

You sent an attachment.
Pakistani vocalist and one of the greatest Qawwals (performers of Qawwali) of all time. He was known for his powerful, soulful voice and for bringing Sufi devotional music to the global stage. His performances were deeply spiritual, emotional, and often felt transcendent, earning him titles like “Shahenshah-e-Qawwali” (King of Qawwali). He influenced artists across the world, including in Western music, and his voice still moves millions-even decades after his passing in 1997. From classical Qawwalis to film soundtracks, his range and depth were unmatched. Video Courtesy - Oriental star agencies Ltd (YouTube

This clip is taken from shiracko media The clip has become a popular "relatable" meme and reaction video, used in the following ways: Self-Deprecation: Users often caption it with "Me if I ever get into politics" to mock how people's morals might change when they benefit from a broken system. Political Satire: It is frequently used to criticize the hypocrisy of leaders who condemn corruption while in opposition but participate in it once they gain power. Social Commentary: Online discussions use the quote to argue that many people do not actually hate corruption itself, but rather the fact that they are excluded from its benefits. . . . #friendship #memes #viralvideos

Follow karo 🥹😐 🇯🇵 当达到这个速度时，它不再是地面运动，而是以音速移动。🚀🌍这个模拟演示了乘坐1马赫（约1330公里/小时）的超音速列车穿越日本会是什么样子。目前，日本最快的火车运行速度约为320公里/小时，而在超高速磁悬浮列车等先进实验平台上，速度已经在受控环境中实现。

Ernesto "Che" Guevara (1928–1967) was an Argentine Marxist revolutionary, physician, author, and diplomat who became a major figure of the Cuban Revolution. Since his death, his stylized face has become a ubiquitous countercultural symbol of rebellion and global insurrection. In Mexico City, Guevara met Fidel Castro and joined his "26th of July Movement." He was the only non-Cuban on the Granma yacht that set sail to overthrow the U.S.-backed dictator Fulgencio Batista. Execution: On October 9, 1967, after being captured in the Yuro Ravine, he was summarily executed in the village of La Higuera. He was 39 years old. . . . . . . . #che #trendingreel #cheguevara #motivational #viralreels

A viral audio clip online claims that Donald Trump didn’t want the full Epstein files to be released. While there isn’t an official recording with that exact phrase, several news reports show that in late 2025 and early 2026, the U.S. Department of Justice under Trump’s administration released millions of pages of documents connected to Jeffrey Epstein but did not publish some FBI interview summaries involving allegations against Trump. These missing files have sparked public debate about whether all records were shared transparently. Democrats on the House Oversight Committee say the Justice Department is withholding roughly half of the total Epstein files, despite the Epstein Files Transparency Act requiring release by December 19, 2025. The DOJ says withheld material was legally protected or redundant. This controversy has kept the issue in the news and fueled online claims about Trump’s role in the process. #usa #war #epstein #epsteinfiles #iran EpsteinFiles PublicRecords Trump2026 BreakingNews Transparency

𝚈𝚊𝚜𝚑𝚊𝚗𝚜𝚑

You sent an attachment.
Read this: The Salvatore Brothers—Damon Salvatore and Stefan Salvatore—are the central vampire protagonists of The Vampire Diaries, an American supernatural drama series based on L.J. Smith’s novels. The brothers are centuries-old vampires with opposite personalities: Stefan is the compassionate, morally struggling “good brother,” while Damon is the sarcastic, ruthless, yet deeply emotional “bad boy.” Their complicated bond, rivalry over Elena Gilbert, and shared tragic past form the emotional core of the entire series. ⭐IMDb Rating~7.7–7.8/10 (The Vampire Diaries series) ✨Rotten Tomatoes: ~86% (Audience score, critics mixed) 🌟Metacritic: ~55–60/100 🏆Academy Awards: Not eligible (TV series) Language: English 🗓️Release Year: 2009 (series debut) 🎥Main Cast: Ian Somerhalder (Damon), Paul Wesley (Stefan), Nina Dobrev (Elena) 📹Director: Various (created by Kevin Williamson & Julie Plec) 🧛‍♂️🩸 💰Budget: Estimated $2–3 Million per episode 💵WorldWide Collection: Massive global TV syndication and streaming success Stefan Salvatore is known as the “Ripper,” a vampire who struggles with blood addiction and guilt over his violent past. He represents self-control, sacrifice, and moral conflict, constantly trying to live like a human despite being a predator. Damon, on the other hand, embraces his vampiric nature, masking pain with sarcasm, cruelty, and charm. His character arc from villain to anti-hero made him one of the most popular TV vampires ever. The Salvatore brothers are iconic because they represent two sides of immortality: redemption versus indulgence. Their brotherhood is full of betrayal, sacrifice, and deep love, making their dynamic more important than any romance in the show. In modern pop culture, Damon and Stefan became Gen-Z-level legendary vampire archetypes—one dark and chaotic, the other tragic and noble—basically redefining what TV vampires look and feel like.

In an emotional incident, a young boy reportedly stopped eating for five days after his girlfriend ended their relationship. Deeply worried about his son’s health and condition, the father decided to take matters into his own hands. According to sources, the concerned father personally went to meet the girl to talk and understand the situation. His step has sparked mixed reactions on social media, with many calling it a father’s unconditional love, while others debated whether parents should interfere in such personal matters. The incident highlights how heartbreak can deeply affect young people and how family support plays a crucial role during tough times. . . 🎥 Respective Owners ( DM Me For Clip Credit and Removal ) . . 𝘛𝘩𝘪𝘴 𝘷𝘪𝘥𝘦𝘰 𝘪𝘴 𝘴𝘩𝘢𝘳𝘦𝘥 𝘧𝘰𝘳 𝘪𝘯𝘧𝘰𝘳𝘮𝘢𝘵𝘪𝘰𝘯𝘢𝘭 𝘱𝘶𝘳𝘱𝘰𝘴𝘦𝘴 𝘰𝘯𝘭𝘺. 𝘍𝘈𝘐𝘙 𝘜𝘚𝘌: 𝘊𝘰𝘱𝘺𝘳𝘪𝘨𝘩𝘵 𝘥𝘪𝘴𝘤𝘭𝘢𝘪𝘮𝘦𝘳 𝘶𝘯𝘥𝘦𝘳 𝘴𝘦𝘤𝘵𝘪𝘰𝘯 107 𝘰𝘧 𝘵𝘩𝘦 𝘤𝘰𝘱𝘺𝘳𝘪𝘨𝘩𝘵 𝘢𝘤𝘵 1976. 𝘈𝘭𝘭𝘰𝘸𝘢𝘯𝘤𝘦 𝘪𝘴 𝘮𝘢𝘥𝘦 𝘧𝘰𝘳 “𝘍𝘢𝘪𝘳 𝘜𝘴𝘦” 𝘧𝘰𝘳 𝘱𝘶𝘳𝘱𝘰𝘴𝘦𝘴 𝘴𝘶𝘤𝘩 𝘢𝘴 𝘤𝘳𝘪𝘵𝘪𝘤𝘪𝘴𝘮, 𝘤𝘰𝘮𝘮𝘦𝘯𝘵, 𝘯𝘦𝘸𝘴 𝘳𝘦𝘱𝘰𝘳𝘵𝘪𝘯𝘨, 𝘵𝘦𝘢𝘤𝘩𝘪𝘯𝘨, 𝘴𝘤𝘩𝘰𝘭𝘢𝘳𝘴𝘩𝘪𝘱 𝘪𝘯𝘧𝘳𝘪𝘯𝘨𝘪𝘯𝘨. 𝚈𝚊𝚜𝚑𝚊𝚗𝚜𝚑

You sent an attachment.
This video captures a calm but fascinating interaction between humans, wildlife, and an urban green space, showing how carefully designed parks allow people and animals to coexist. The shallow water feature where people are standing is often intentionally built in public parks to manage rainwater runoff, reduce flooding, and create a natural habitat for birds like geese and ducks, which prefer slow-moving or still water. Geese are highly adaptable waterfowl and are commonly found in human-developed areas because they benefit from open water, grass for grazing, and fewer natural predators. The illuminated pedestrian bridge in the background highlights modern landscape architecture, where aesthetic lighting is combined with functional walkways to improve safety and encourage evening foot traffic. Scenes like this also demonstrate how wildlife becomes accustomed to human presence when there is no immediate threat, allowing close observation without aggression. However, experts often advise maintaining respectful distance, as wild birds can become defensive, especially during breeding seasons. Overall, this moment reflects how urban ecosystems, thoughtful infrastructure, and human curiosity intersect-turning everyday public spaces into shared environments rather than purely human territory

You sent an attachment.
Электричество из шагов? В Японии - да! Япония использует пьезоэлектрические плитки, которые превращают шаги людей в энергию⚡ Как это работает?👇 👣 Ты идёшь 🔧 плитка слегка изгибается ⚙️ возникает напряжение 💡и оно превращается в электричество Каждый шаг немного энергии. Но миллионы шагов = реальная польза💥 📍В местах вроде Станция Сибуя ➡️ ~2,4 млн шагов в день ➡️ хватает для LED-огней, экранов и датчиков Энергия может: 🔋накапливаться ⚡использоваться сразу Итог👇 Обычное движение = почти возобновляемый источник энергии🌿 Будущее городов уже здесь🚀 Подпишись, чтобы знать больше👀✨ #Япония #факты #технологии #инновации #умныйгород энергия наука эксперимент зналлиты втренде
abblack.edits
https://www.instagram.com/reel/DU3kHtrgYwf/?id=3834692467488295967_76224814282

You sent an attachment.
Электричество из шагов? В Японии - да! Япония использует пьезоэлектрические плитки, которые превращают шаги людей в энергию⚡ Как это работает?👇 👣 Ты идёшь 🔧 плитка слегка изгибается ⚙️ возникает напряжение 💡и оно превращается в электричество Каждый шаг немного энергии. Но миллионы шагов = реальная польза💥 📍В местах вроде Станция Сибуя ➡️ ~2,4 млн шагов в день ➡️ хватает для LED-огней, экранов и датчиков Энергия может: 🔋накапливаться ⚡использоваться сразу Итог👇 Обычное движение = почти возобновляемый источник энергии🌿 Будущее городов уже здесь🚀 Подпишись, чтобы знать больше👀✨ #Япония #факты #технологии #инновации #умныйгород энергия наука эксперимент зналлиты втренде

You sent an attachment.
XRIG Hexarack | Don't just run AI, Build It! The Hexarack is a high-performance compute server built for extreme AI and data workloads. Powered by dual NVIDIA H200 GPUs and two AMD EPYC 9634 processors, it delivers massive parallel processing, high memory bandwidth, and exceptional multi-threaded performance. Such a system is designed for large-scale AI model training, generative AI inference, scientific simulations, real-time rendering, advanced analytics, and enterprise virtualization. The H200 GPUs accelerate deep learning and high-performance computing tasks, while the EPYC CPUs manage orchestration, data pipelines, and virtualization layers. Together, they create a powerhouse platform for research labs, AI startups, VFX studios, and enterprises pushing the boundaries of computation and innovation. Specs Processor : Dual AMD EPYC 9634 84 Core 168 Thread Memory : 1TB DDR5 ECC RDIMM-5600MHz Memory ( 64GB*16 ) Physical Storage : 18TB NVMe Enterprise Grade ( 1TB*2 , 8TB*2 Hotswappable ) GPU : Dual H200- 141GB Nvidia GPU #AIRevolution #NVIDIAH200 #AMDEPYC #HPC #DataCenterPower

𝚈𝚊𝚜𝚑𝚊𝚗𝚜𝚑

You sent an attachment.
2023年，足球传奇克里斯蒂亚诺·罗纳尔多（Cristiano Ronaldo）与里奥·梅西（Lionel Messi）在一档专门回顾他们辉煌职业生涯的特别节目中，共同呈现了一个难忘瞬间。这两位被视为同代最伟大的球员，常常被看作对手，却在节目中罕见地齐聚一堂，带来了温暖人心的一幕，让全球球迷为之欣喜。 节目中，以自信与表演天赋著称的罗纳尔多调皮地提出了一个特别挑战——花式颠球比赛。梅西一如既往地冷静从容，带着微笑接受挑战。当镜头捕捉下这一刻，两位偶像以轻松娴熟的技术互相传球颠球，展示出二十多年来令人着迷的足球魔力。 CR7的爆发力与梅西的优雅相结合，创造出令人目眩的视觉盛宴，让球迷再次回忆起这两位传奇为何能主宰足球历史。他们之间显而易见的相互尊重与钦佩，证明了尽管多年竞争，他们对足球的热爱超越了任何对立。 #足球 #运动 #fifa #uefa #英超 西甲 世界杯 梅西 英超 西甲 热门 搞笑 搞笑视频 生活 运动 健身

You sent an attachment.
日本利用压电瓷砖将脚步转化为电能。这些瓷砖捕捉来自你脚步的动能。当你行走时，你的重量和动作会对瓷砖产生压力。瓷砖会轻微弯曲，从而产生机械应力。瓷砖内部的压电材料将这种应力转化为电能。每一步都会产生少量电荷，而数百万步结合在一起就能产生足够的电力来驱动 LED 灯、数字显示屏和传感器。在像涩谷车站这样繁忙的地方，每天大约有 240 万个脚步为这一系统作出贡献。这些电能可以被储存或立即使用，从而减少对传统电力来源的依赖，并支持可持续的城市基础设施。这种方法将日常运动转化为实用的可再生能源 #日本 #知识 #事实 你知道吗 推荐 科技 创新 历史 技术 实验 热门
_slaxy.vibes

日本利用压电瓷砖将脚步转化为电能。这些瓷砖捕捉来自你脚步的动能。当你行走时,你的重量和动作用会对瓷砖产生压力。瓷砖会轻微弯曲,从而产生机械应力。瓷砖内部的压电材料将这种应力转化为电能。 每一步都会产生少量电荷,而数百万步结合在一起就能产生足够的电力来驱动LED灯、显示屏和传感器。 在像涩谷车站这样繁忙的地方,每天大约有240万个脚步为这一系统作出贡献。这些电能可以被储存或立即使用,从而减少对传统电力来源的依赖,并支持可持续的城市基础设施。这种方法将日常运动转化为实用的可再生能源。 #日本 #知识 #事实#你知道吗#推荐#科技 #创新 #历史 #技术 #实验 #热门

𝚈𝚊𝚜𝚑𝚊𝚗𝚜𝚑

You sent an attachment.
日本利用压电瓷砖将脚步转化为电能。这些瓷砖捕捉来自你脚步的动能。当你行走时，你的重量和动作会对瓷砖产生压力。瓷砖会轻微弯曲，从而产生机械应力。瓷砖内部的压电材料将这种应力转化为电能。每一步都会产生少量电荷，而数百万步结合在一起就能产生足够的电力来驱动LED 灯、数字显示屏和传感器。在像涩谷车站这样繁忙的地方，每天大约有240万个脚步为这一系统作出贡献。这些电能可以被储存或立即使用，从而减少对传统电力来源的依赖，并支持可持续的城市基础设施。这种方法将日常运动转化为实用的可再生能源 #日本 #知识＃事实 #你知道吗＃推荐 #科技 #创新 ＃历史 #技术 #实验 #热门

जापान अब “चलते कदमों" से बिजली बना रहा है ! 4 जापान में अब ऐसी पाईज़ोइलेक्ट्रिक (Piezoelectric) टाइलें लगाई जा रही हैं, जो तुम्हारे हर कदम से पैदा होने वाली ऊर्जा को बिजली में बदल देती हैं। जब लोग इन टाइलों पर चलते हैं, तो उनका वजन और कदम टाइलों पर दबाव डालता है, जिससे टाइलें हल्की-सी मुड़ती हैं और इसी दबाव के अंदर मौजूद पदार्थ इस दबाव को बिजली में बदल देता है! हर कदम से थोड़ी-थोड़ी बिजली बनती है, लेकिन जब लाखों लोग रोज़ चलते हैं- (जैसे कि टोक्यो के शिबुया स्टेशन पर (जहाँ रोज़ 24 लाख से ज्यादा कदम पड़ते हैं! ) - तो इतनी ऊर्जा बन जाती है कि उससे LED लाइट्स, डिस्प्ले और सेंसर तक चलाए जा सकते हैं! ? ये तकनीकें दिखाती हैं कि भविष्य का शहर हर कदम से "चार्ज" होगा!! सोचो - अगर हमारे शहरों में भी ऐसी टाइलें लगी, तो हम अपने चलने से ही बिजली बना सकते हैं? 4 #जापान #तकनीक #भविष्य #TRACT_TAG #verdeened foured #ATA #FT_S日本利用压电瓷砖将脚步转化为电能。这些瓷砖捕捉来自你脚步的动能。当你行走时,你的重量和动作会对瓷砖产生压力。瓷砖会 轻微弯曲,从而产生机械应力。瓷砖内部的压电材料将这种应力转化为电能。每一步都会产生少量电荷,而数百万步结合在一起就能产生足够的电力来驱动 LED灯、数字显示屏和传感器。在 像涩谷车站这样繁忙的地方,每天大约有240万个脚步为这一系统作出贡献。这些电能可以被储存或立即使用,从而减少对传统电力来源的依赖,并支持可持续的城市基础设施。这种方法将 日常运动转化为实用的可再生能源#日本#知识#事实#你知道吗#推荐#科技 #创新 #历史#技术#实验#热门日本利用压电瓷砖将脚步转化为电能。 这些瓷砖捕捉来自你脚步的动能。当 你行走时,你的重量和动作会对瓷砖产生压力。瓷砖会轻微弯曲,从而产生机械应力。瓷砖内部的压电材料将这种应力转化为电能。每一步都会产生少量电荷,而数百万步结合在一起就能产生 足够的电力来驱动LED灯、数字显示屏和传感器。在像涩谷车站这样繁忙的地方,每天大约有240万个脚步为这一系统作出贡献。这些电能可以被储存或立即使用,从而减少对传统电力来源 的依赖,并支持可持续的城市基础设施。这种方法将日常运动转化为实用的可再生能源#日本#知识 #事实 # 你知道吗#推荐#科技#创新#历史 #技术#实验#热门日本利用压电瓷砖将脚步 这此次体捕坦白你脚步的动能 当你行走时你的重量和动作会对次住立生区┐ 次住人权得亦曲"而立生机械应力 次住内部的区由材料将这种应中林化为由 #trendingreels #explore #viralvideoshorts #india #reel #instagram #comedyreel #comedyinstvideo #fuunyreel #instareelsindia

You sent an attachment.
भारत में कुछ ट्रैफिक सिग्नल सौर ऊर्जा से संचालित होते हैं। इन सिग्नलों के ऊपर लगे सोलर पैनल सूरज की रोशनी को सीधे बिजली में बदलते हैं। दिन के समय ये पैनल ऊर्जा उत्पन्न करते हैं और अतिरिक्त बिजली बैटरियों में संग्रहित कर ली जाती है। रात में या बिजली कटौती के दौरान यही संग्रहित ऊर्जा ट्रैफिक सिग्नलों को चालू रखती है। इस तकनीक का उपयोग खासतौर पर उन क्षेत्रों में किया जाता है जहाँ बिजली आपूर्ति अस्थिर होती है। इससे ट्रैफिक व्यवस्था अधिक विश्वसनीय बनती है और सड़क दुर्घटनाओं का खतरा कम होता है। साथ ही, यह प्रणाली ईंधन की खपत और कार्बन उत्सर्जन को घटाने में भी मदद करती है। सौर ऊर्जा से चलने वाले ट्रैफिक सिग्नल न केवल पर्यावरण के लिए लाभदायक हैं, बल्कि रखरखाव की लागत भी कम करते हैं। यह उदाहरण दिखाता है कि कैसे भारत में नवीकरणीय ऊर्जा को रोज़मर्रा की शहरी समस्याओं के समाधान के रूप में अपनाया जा रहा है। #India #IncredibleIndia #SmartIndia #Technology #innovation

A short Viral clip from a school Republic Day rehearsal has exploded across social media platforms today, drawing millions of views, laughs, and heated debates in just hours. The video shows a teacher leading a group of young boys through a standard marching or counting drill in Hindi: “Ekai... Dahai... Saikda...” (roughly translating to "Units... Tens... Hundreds..." – a common way to practice rhythm and synchronization for parades). What follows is pure, unfiltered chaos: the children, full of energy and without missing a beat, shout back at the top of their lungs:

You sent an attachment.
In a hilarious and relatable moment caught on camera, a young schoolboy was given the fright of his life after his mother decided to use the ultimate "scare tactic" to keep him in line. The clip shows the mother spotting a local policeman and immediately pulling over to playfully complain about her son bunking school. Someone captured the boy’s priceless reaction as he burst into tears, desperately trying to hide behind his mother while promising never to skip class again. The video has quickly gone viral for its perfect portrayal of a classic "desi parent" disciplinary move. Viewers are reacting with non-stop laughter, with many reminiscing about their own childhoods when the mere mention of a policeman was enough to stop any mischief. Social media users have praised the local officer for playing along with the mother’s joke, maintaining a serious face just long enough to teach the boy a lesson he will not forget. The video has become a favorite for parents across the internet, proving that sometimes a little bit of staged drama is the most effective way to ensure a child stays on the right path toward school. A simple morning commute turned into a viral comedy sketch, proving that a mother’s wit is the most powerful tool in her parenting handbook. #ViralVideo #FunnyMoments #FunnyParents #DesiMemes #SchoolLife #InternetReacts #Parenting

𝙈𝙧_𝘼𝙧𝙘𝙖𝙣𝙪𝙢_𝙋𝙚𝙣𝙪𝙢𝙗𝙧𝙖~ sent an attachment.
Samjh kar bhai wo tujhse pyar karti hai 😂 . . . 在日本，研究人员正利用智能人行道将日常活动转化为清洁能源⚡。这些道路内嵌特殊的压电材料，可以从行人的脚步中收集动能。当人们行走、奔跑或跳跃时，路面会轻微变形，从而产生机械压力。压电晶体将这种压力转化为电能🔋。 这些能量可用于照亮路灯、为公共显示屏供电，甚至监测行人流量。这种技术不仅减少了能源浪费，还展示了未来城市的无限可能🌍。 在东京、京都等城市的试验区，人们的每一步都在为绿色地球贡献力量💚。科技让生活更环保，也让每一个脚步更有意义✨ #日本 #科技 #创新 #可持续 #绿色能源 未来城市 环保 知识 事实 推荐 你知道吗 技术 实验 热门

Abhi tk to move on ho jana chahiye 🙃 Follow for more 🥀 king of Qawwali) . . . . . Ustad Nusrat Fateh Ali Khan a legendary Pakistani vocalist and one of the greatest Qawwals (performers of Qawwali) of all time. He was known for his powerful, soulful voice and for bringing Sufi devotional music to the global stage. His performances were deeply spiritual, emotional, and often felt transcendent, earning him titles like "Shahenshah-e-Qawwali" (King of Qawwali). Ig: wordsbysolo He influenced artists across the world, including in Western music, his voice still moves millions-even decades after his passing in 1997. From classical Qawwalis to film soundtracks, his range and depth were unmatched. . . . . . . Join Telegram Link In Bio ♥️ . . .🇯🇵 この速度に達すると、もはや陸上を移動しているのではなく、音速で移動していることになります🚀🌍 このシミュレーションは、マッハ1、つまり時速約1,330kmで日本を超音速鉄道で旅するとどのような感じになるかを視覚化したものです。現在、日本の最速列車は約時速320kmで運行されており、超高速リニアモーターカーのような先進的な試験プラットフォームでは、制御された環境下で時速600kmを超えています。 このシミュレーションはそれをはるかに超え、現在の鉄道コンセプトが真の超音速システムに進化した場合に何が可能になるかを探ります。この速度に到達するには、単なる動力だけでは不十分です。エンジニアたちは、超高速走行における最大の制限要因である空気抵抗を排除するために、磁気浮上、ほぼゼロ摩擦のガイドウェイ、真空または低圧チューブシステムなどを研究しています。マッハレベルの移動では、わずかな空気の乱れでさえ構造上の課題となります。 だからこそ、将来の超音速鉄道構想は、精密誘導システム、AI制御の安定性、そして数百キロメートルにわたってミリメートル単位の許容誤差で構築されたインフラに依存しています。実現すれば、現在何時間もかかる移動が数分に短縮され、通勤、地域経済、そして大都市間の大規模な接続方法を根本的に変える可能性があります。 テクノロジーはお好きですか？ #日本 #知识 #事实 #你知道吗 #推荐 科技 创新 历史 技术 实验 热门 世界日本経済成長

You sent an attachment.
日本利用压电瓷砖将人们的脚步转化为电能。 这些瓷砖能够捕捉你脚步产生的动能。 当你行走时，你的体重和动作会对瓷砖产生压力。 瓷砖会轻微弯曲，产生机械应力。 瓷砖内部的压电材料会将这种应力转化为电能。 每一步都会产生少量电荷，数百万步加在一起，就能产生足够的电力来驱动 LED 灯、数字显示屏和传感器。 在像涩谷车站这样人流密集的地方，每天大约 240 万步都在为这个系统做贡献。 这些电力可以储存起来或立即使用，从而减少对传统能源的依赖，并支持可持续的城市基础设施。 这种方法把日常的动作转化为实用的可再生能源。 #日本 #知识 #事实 #你知道吗 #推荐 #科技 #创新 #历史 #技术 #实验 #热门日本利用压电瓷砖将人们的脚步转化为电能。 这些瓷砖能够捕捉你脚步产生的动能。 当你行走时，你的体重和动作会对瓷砖产生压力。 瓷砖会轻微弯曲，产生机械应力。 瓷砖内部的压电材料会将这种应力转化为电能。 每一步都会产生少量电荷，数百万步加在一起，就能产生足够的电力来驱动 LED 灯、数字显示屏和传感器。 在像涩谷车站这样人流密集的地方，每天大约 240 万步都在为这个系统做贡献。 这些电力可以储存起来或立即使用，从而减少对传统能源的依赖，并支持可持续的城市基础设施。 这种方法把日常的动作转化为实用的可再生能源。 #日本 #知识 #事实 #你知道吗 #推荐 #科技 #创新 #历史 #技术 #实验 #热门日本利用压电瓷砖将人们的脚步转化为电能。 这些瓷砖能够捕捉你脚步产生的动能。 当你行走时，你的体重和动作会对瓷砖产生压力。 瓷砖会轻微弯曲，产生机械应力。 瓷砖内部的压电材料会将这种应力转化为电能。 每一步都会产生少量电荷，数百万步加在一起，就能产生足够的电力来驱动 LED 灯、数字显示屏和传感器。 在像涩谷车站这样人流密集的地方，每天大约 240 万步都在为这个系统做贡献。 这些电力可以储存起来或立即使用，从而减少对传统能源的依赖，并支持可持续的城市基础设施。 这种方法把日常的动作转化为实用的可再生能源。 #日本 #知识 #事实 #你知道吗 #推荐 #科技 #创新 #历史 #技术 #实验 #热门 V.C :- @poetic.worldin 1st Poet :- अमजद इस्लाम अमजद 2nd poet :- irfan jafri

🤝 Interesting fact: In The Great Gatsby (2013), Baz Luhrmann used a mix of 1920s jazz and modern music to create a unique soundtrack. Behind the scenes, he also had actors attend elaborate costume fittings and rehearsals to make the parties feel authentic and over-the-top, capturing the extravagance of Gatsby’s world.

You sent an attachment.
Tage 日本利用压电瓷砖将脚步转化为电能。这些瓷砖捕捉来自你脚步的动能。当你行走时，你的重量和动作会对瓷砖产生压力。瓷砖会轻微弯曲，从而产生机械应力。瓷砖内部的压电材料将这种应力转化为电能。每一步都会产生少量电荷，而数百万步结合在一起就能产生足够的电力来驱动 LED 灯、数字显示屏和传感器。在像涩谷车站这样繁忙的地方，每天大约有 240 万个脚步为这一系统作出贡献。这些电能可以被储存或立即使用，从而减少对传统电力来源的依赖，并支持可持续的城市基础设施。这种方法将日常运动转化为实用的可再生能源 #日本 #知识 #事实 #你知道吗 #推荐 科技 创新 历史 技术 实验 热门 日本利用压电瓷砖将脚步转化为电能。这些瓷砖捕捉来自你脚步的动能。当你行走时，你的重量和动作会对瓷砖产生压力。瓷砖会轻微弯曲，从而产生机械应力。瓷砖内部的压电材料将这种应力转化为电能。每一步都会产生少量电荷，而数百万步结合在一起就能产生足够的电力来驱动 LED 灯、数字显示屏和传感器。在像涩谷车站这样繁忙的地方，每天大约有 240 万个脚步为这一系统作出贡献。这些电能可以被储存或立即使用，从而减少对传统电力来源的依赖，并支持可持续的城市基础设施。这种方法将日常运动转化为实用的可再生能源 日本 知识 事实 你知道吗 推荐 科技 创新 历史 技术 实验 热门 日本利用压电瓷砖将脚步转化为电能。这些瓷砖捕捉来自你脚步的动能。当你行走时，你的重量和动作会对瓷砖产生压力。瓷砖会轻微弯曲，从而产生机械应力。瓷砖内部的压电材料将这种应力转化为电能。每一步都会产生少量电荷，而数百万步结合在一起就能产生足够的电力来驱动 LED 灯、数字显示屏和传感器。在像涩谷车站这样繁忙的地方，每天大约有 240 万个脚步为这一系统作出贡献。这些电能可以被储存或立即使用，从而减少对传统电力来源的依赖，并支持可持续的城市基础设施。这种方法将日常运动转化为实用的可再生能源 日本 知识 事实 你知道吗 推荐 科技 创新 历史 技术 实验 热门

Tag your friends 😜 在日本，研究人员正利用智能人行道将日常活动转化为清洁能源⚡。这些道路内嵌特殊的压电材料，可以从行人的脚步中收集动能。当人们行走、奔跑或跳跃时，路面会轻微变形，从而产生机械压力。压电晶体将这种压力转化为电能🔋。 这些能量可用于照亮路灯、为公共显示屏供电，甚至监测行人流量。这种技术不仅减少了能源浪费，还展示了未来城市的无限可能🌍。 在东京、京都等城市的试验区，人们的每一步都在为绿色地球贡献力量💚。科技让生活更环保，也让每一个脚步更有意义✨ 未来城市 环保 知识 事实 推荐 你知道吗 技术 实验 热门

Send this to her ❤️ 📱 iCarly 2007–2012 · Comedy/Family · 6 Seasons 📜 Storyline The series follows Carly Shay, a creative and kind-hearted teen who accidentally becomes an internet sensation after starting her own web show with her best friends, Sam and Freddie. As they juggle school, friendships, and growing up, the trio navigates the ups and downs of fame while staying true to themselves—with plenty of humor, heart, and chaos along the way. 📅 Original release: September 8, 2007 (US) 🎬 Creator: Dan Schneider 🎭 Main cast: Miranda Cosgrove (Carly Shay), Jennette McCurdy (Sam Puckett), Nathan Kress (Freddie Benson), Jerry Trainor (Spencer Shay) ⭐ IMDb rating: 6.8/10 🍅 Rotten Tomatoes: 83% Audience Score 🏢 Network: Nickelodeon 📍 Setting: Seattle, Washington — from apartments to web studios and school hallways 🎶 Music: Catchy, upbeat theme song that became instantly recognizable 💭 Themes: Friendship, creativity, growing up, internet culture, staying authentic ✨ Fun Fact: Miranda Cosgrove became one of the highest-paid child actors on television during iCarly, earning up to $180,000 per episode at the show’s peak. 📺 Where to Watch: iCarly is available to stream on Paramount+ and to rent or purchase on platforms like Amazon Prime Video and Apple TV (availability may vary).

𝚈𝚊𝚜𝚑𝚊𝚗𝚜𝚑

You sent an attachment.
日本利用压电瓷砖将脚步转化为电能。这些瓷砖捕捉来自你脚步的动能。当你行走时,你的重量和动作会对瓷砖产生压力。瓷砖会轻微弯曲,从而产生机械应力。瓷砖内部的压电材料将这种应力转化为电能。每一步都会产生少量电荷,而数百万步结合在一起就能产生足够的电力来驱动 LED灯、数字显示屏和传感器。在像涩谷车站这样繁忙的地方,每天大约有240万个脚步为这一系统作出贡献。这些电能可以被储存或立即使用,从而减少对传统电力来源的依赖,并支持可持续的城市基础设施。这种方法将日常运动转化为实用的可再生能源。#日本 #知识 #事实 #你知道吗 #推荐 #科技 #创新 #历史 #技术 #实验 #热门
husayn._.says

You sent an attachment.
🎬 Titanic 1997 ‧ Romance/Adventure ‧ 3h 14m 📜 Storyline Rose DeWitt Bukater, a young aristocrat trapped in a suffocating engagement, boards the R.M.S. Titanic expecting a journey into a life she dreads. However, her world changes when she meets Jack Dawson, a penniless artist who won his ticket in a poker game. Despite the vast social divide, they fall deeply in love, finding freedom in each other. Their passionate romance soon turns into a terrifying fight for survival when the "unsinkable" ship strikes an iceberg, plunging the passengers into a chaotic struggle against the freezing North Atlantic. 🎞️ Title Info 🚢 Titanic: A cinematic masterpiece that held the record for the highest-grossing film of all time for twelve years and remains a cultural phenomenon. 📅 Release date: December 19, 1997 🎬 Director: James Cameron 🖊️ Writer: James Cameron 👫 Main Cast: Leonardo DiCaprio, Kate Winslet, Billy Zane, Kathy Bates, and Bill Paxton 💰 Budget: $200 million (The most expensive film ever made at the time) 💵 Box office: $2.264 billion worldwide 🏆 Awards: Won 11 Academy Awards, including Best Picture and Best Director (tying the record for most wins) 🎶 Music: Composed by James Horner, featuring the iconic song "My Heart Will Go On" by Celine Dion 🏢 Distributed by: Paramount Pictures (North America) and 20th Century Fox (International) ⏱️ Running time: 3 hours 14 minutes ⭐ IMDb rating: 7.9/10 🍅 Rotten Tomatoes: 88% 🌊 Visual Effects: Pioneered groundbreaking CGI combined with massive physical models to recreate the ship and its sinking 🎥 Cultural Impact: Selected for preservation in the United States National Film Registry in 2017 📺 Where to Watch Titanic is currently available to stream on Paramount+ and Prime Video in the United States. It can also be rented or purchased in high definition on major digital platforms such as Apple TV, Amazon Prime Video, Google Play Movies, YouTube, and Vudu. 🔔 Follow @ekazop for more content like this! 💌 DM for credit or removal requests (no copyright infringement intended for video, photo, or music). All rights and credits reserved to the respective owner(s). #titanic #romance #adventure #movie #ekazop

𝚈𝚊𝚜𝚑𝚊𝚗𝚜𝚑

You sent an attachment.
:) 日本利用压电瓷砖将脚步转化为电能。这些瓷砖捕捉来 自你脚步的动能。当你行走时,你的重量和动作会对瓷 砖产生压力。瓷砖会轻微弯曲,从而产生机械应力。瓷 砖内部的压电材料将这种应力转化为电能。每一步都会 产生少量电荷,而数百万步结合在一起就能产生足够的 电力来驱动 LED灯、数字显示屏和传感器。在像涩谷车 站这样繁忙的地方,每天大约有240万个脚步为这一系 统作出贡献。这些电能可以被储存或立即使用,从而减 少对传统电力来源的依赖,并支持可持续的城市基础设 施。这种方法将日常运动转化为实用的可再生能源 #日 本 #知识 #事实 你知道吗 推荐 科技创新 历史 技术实 验 热门

When the icy villain Zeta threatens to destroy both Bird Island and Piggy Island, Red, Chuck, Bomb, Silver, and even King Leonard must join forces in an epic, laugh-filled adventure. Packed with slapstick comedy, action, and heart, this animated sequel delivers fun for the whole family. Main Cast (Voices): Jason Sudeikis as Red Josh Gad as Chuck Danny McBride as Bomb Rachel Bloom as Silver Leslie Jones as Zeta Peter Dinklage as Mighty Eagle Fun Fact: The Angry Birds Movie 2 is praised as one of the funniest and best-reviewed video game movies ever made 🎮✨. #AngryBirds2 #AngryBirdsMovie #FamilyComedy #AnimatedMovies #JasonSudeikis #JoshGad #LeslieJones #BirdIsland #PiggyIsland #VideoGameMovies

𝙏𝙝𝙚 𝙃𝙤𝙣𝙙𝙖 𝘾𝙞𝙫𝙞𝙘 𝙏𝙮𝙥𝙚 𝙍 𝙞𝙨 𝙖 𝙝𝙞𝙜𝙝𝙥𝙚𝙧𝙛𝙤𝙧𝙢𝙖𝙣𝙘𝙚 𝙫𝙖𝙧𝙞𝙖𝙣𝙩 𝙤𝙛 𝙩𝙝𝙚 𝙃𝙤𝙣𝙙𝙖 𝘾𝙞𝙫𝙞𝙘 𝙠𝙣𝙤𝙬𝙣 𝙛𝙤𝙧 𝙞𝙩𝙨 𝙨𝙥𝙤𝙧𝙩𝙮 𝙘𝙝𝙖𝙧𝙖𝙘𝙩𝙚𝙧𝙞𝙨𝙩𝙞𝙘𝙨 𝙖𝙣𝙙 𝙧𝙖𝙘𝙞𝙣𝙜 𝙝𝙚𝙧𝙞𝙩𝙖𝙜𝙚 𝙆𝙚𝙮 𝙛𝙚𝙖𝙩𝙪𝙧𝙚𝙨 𝙤𝙛 𝙧𝙚𝙘𝙚𝙣𝙩 𝙢𝙤𝙙𝙚𝙡𝙨 𝙞𝙣𝙘𝙡𝙪𝙙𝙚 1. * 𝙀𝙣𝙜𝙞𝙣𝙚*: 𝘼 𝙩𝙪𝙧𝙗𝙤𝙘𝙝𝙖𝙧𝙜𝙚𝙙 𝙡𝙞𝙩𝙚𝙧 𝙞𝙣𝙡𝙞𝙣𝙚𝙛𝙤𝙪𝙧 𝙚𝙣𝙜𝙞𝙣𝙚 𝙩𝙮𝙥𝙞𝙘𝙖𝙡𝙡𝙮 𝙥𝙧𝙤𝙙𝙪𝙘𝙞𝙣𝙜 𝙖𝙧𝙤𝙪𝙣𝙙 𝙝𝙤𝙧𝙨𝙚𝙥𝙤𝙬𝙚𝙧 𝙙𝙚𝙥𝙚𝙣𝙙𝙞𝙣𝙜 𝙤𝙣 𝙩𝙝𝙚 𝙢𝙤𝙙𝙚𝙡 𝙮𝙚𝙖𝙧 2.* 𝙏𝙧𝙖𝙣𝙨𝙢𝙞𝙨𝙨𝙞𝙤𝙣*: 𝘼 𝙨𝙥𝙚𝙚𝙙 𝙢𝙖𝙣𝙪𝙖𝙡 𝙩𝙧𝙖𝙣𝙨𝙢𝙞𝙨𝙨𝙞𝙤𝙣 𝙤𝙛𝙛𝙚𝙧𝙞𝙣𝙜 𝙥𝙧𝙚𝙘𝙞𝙨𝙚 𝙖𝙣𝙙 𝙚𝙣𝙜𝙖𝙜𝙞𝙣𝙜 𝙜𝙚𝙖𝙧 𝙨𝙝𝙞𝙛𝙩𝙨 3.* 𝙋𝙚𝙧𝙛𝙤𝙧𝙢𝙖𝙣𝙘𝙚 *: 𝙄𝙩 𝙗𝙤𝙖𝙨𝙩𝙨 𝙞𝙢𝙥𝙧𝙚𝙨𝙨𝙞𝙫𝙚 𝙖𝙘𝙘𝙚𝙡𝙚𝙧𝙖𝙩𝙞𝙤𝙣 𝙖𝙣𝙙 𝙝𝙖𝙣𝙙𝙡𝙞𝙣𝙜 𝙬𝙞𝙩𝙝 𝙖 𝙛𝙤𝙘𝙪𝙨 𝙤𝙣 𝙖𝙜𝙞𝙡𝙞𝙩𝙮 𝙖𝙣𝙙 𝙙𝙧𝙞𝙫𝙞𝙣𝙜 𝙙𝙮𝙣𝙖𝙢𝙞𝙘𝙨 4.* 𝘿𝙚𝙨𝙞𝙜𝙣*: 𝘿𝙞𝙨𝙩𝙞𝙣𝙘𝙩𝙞𝙫𝙚 𝙨𝙩𝙮𝙡𝙞𝙣𝙜 𝙚𝙡𝙚𝙢𝙚𝙣𝙩𝙨 𝙡𝙞𝙠𝙚 𝙖𝙜𝙜𝙧𝙚𝙨𝙨𝙞𝙫𝙚 𝙛𝙧𝙤𝙣𝙩 𝙗𝙪𝙢𝙥𝙚𝙧𝙨 𝙧𝙚𝙖𝙧 𝙨𝙥𝙤𝙞𝙡𝙚𝙧𝙨 𝙖𝙣𝙙 𝙪𝙣𝙞𝙦𝙪𝙚 𝙬𝙝𝙚𝙚𝙡 𝙙𝙚𝙨𝙞𝙜𝙣𝙨 5. ⁠*𝙄𝙣𝙩𝙚𝙧𝙞𝙤𝙧*: 𝙍𝙖𝙘𝙞𝙣𝙜𝙞𝙣𝙨𝙥𝙞𝙧𝙚𝙙 𝙬𝙞𝙩𝙝 𝙨𝙪𝙥𝙥𝙤𝙧𝙩𝙞𝙫𝙚 𝙨𝙚𝙖𝙩𝙨 𝙖 𝙙𝙧𝙞𝙫𝙚𝙧𝙛𝙤𝙘𝙪𝙨𝙚𝙙 𝙘𝙤𝙘𝙠𝙥𝙞𝙩 𝙖𝙣𝙙 𝙖𝙙𝙫𝙖𝙣𝙘𝙚𝙙 𝙩𝙚𝙘𝙝𝙣𝙤𝙡𝙤𝙜𝙮 𝙛𝙚𝙖𝙩𝙪𝙧𝙚𝙨. 𝙏𝙝𝙚 𝘾𝙞𝙫𝙞𝙘 𝙏𝙮𝙥𝙚 𝙍 𝙞𝙨 𝙘𝙚𝙡𝙚𝙗𝙧𝙖𝙩𝙚𝙙 𝙛𝙤𝙧 𝙞𝙩𝙨 𝙗𝙡𝙚𝙣𝙙 𝙤𝙛 𝙚𝙫𝙚𝙧𝙮𝙙𝙖𝙮 𝙪𝙨𝙖𝙗𝙞𝙡𝙞𝙩𝙮 𝙖𝙣𝙙 𝙩𝙧𝙖𝙘𝙠𝙧𝙚𝙖𝙙𝙮 𝙥𝙚𝙧𝙛𝙤𝙧𝙢𝙖𝙣𝙘𝙚 𝙢𝙖𝙠𝙞𝙣𝙜 𝙞𝙩 𝙖 𝙥𝙤𝙥𝙪𝙡𝙖𝙧 𝙘𝙝𝙤𝙞𝙘𝙚 𝙖𝙢𝙤𝙣𝙜 𝙙𝙧𝙞𝙫𝙞𝙣𝙜 𝙚𝙣𝙩𝙝𝙪𝙨𝙞𝙖𝙨𝙩𝙨

𝚈𝚊𝚜𝚑𝚊𝚗𝚜𝚑

You sent an attachment.
日本利用压电瓷砖将脚步转化为电能。这些瓷砖捕捉来自你脚步的动能。当你行走时,你的重量和动作会对瓷砖产生压力。瓷砖会轻微弯曲,从而产生机械应力。瓷砖内部的压电材料将这种应力转化为电能。每一步都会产生少量电荷,而数百万步结合在一起就能产生足够的电力来驱动 LED 灯、数字显示屏和传感器。在像涩谷车站这样繁忙的地方,每天大约有240 万个脚步为这一系统作出贡献。这些电能可以被储存或立即使用,从而减少对传统电力来源的依赖,并支持可持续的城市基础设施。这种方法将日常运动转化为实用的可再生能源 #日本 #知识 #事实 #你知道吗 #推荐 #科技 #创新 #历史 #技术 #实验 #热门

𝚈𝚊𝚜𝚑𝚊𝚗𝚜𝚑

You sent an attachment.
Kung Fu Panda isn’t just an animated film — it’s a legend wrapped in humor, heart, and the unexpected rise of a hero who never believed he could be one. Po, the clumsy noodle-shop worker with big dreams and even bigger doubts, is chosen as the Dragon Warrior in the most improbable twist of fate. From the moment he tumbles into the Jade Palace, the world of kung fu transforms — no longer defined by perfection, but by possibility. Po’s journey isn’t about becoming stronger than others; it’s about discovering the strength that was hidden inside him all along. As he trains under Master Shifu, struggles beside the Furious Five, and faces the unstoppable Tai Lung, Po learns the truth that lies at the heart of every warrior: greatness comes not from being flawless, but from embracing who you are. His determination, kindness, and unshakable spirit turn every failure into a lesson, every slapstick fall into a step toward destiny. The battles are fierce, but the emotion is deeper — Po’s victory isn’t earned through power but belief. Kung Fu Panda reminds us that heroes aren’t chosen by destiny — they’re chosen by their hearts. And sometimes, the most unlikely warrior is the one who can change the world.

𝙈𝙧_𝘼𝙧𝙘𝙖𝙣𝙪𝙢_𝙋𝙚𝙣𝙪𝙢𝙗𝙧𝙖~

𝙈𝙧_𝘼𝙧𝙘𝙖𝙣𝙪𝙢_𝙋𝙚𝙣𝙪𝙢𝙗𝙧𝙖~ sent an attachment.
तुम जानते हो? जापान अब “चलते कदमों” से बिजली बना रहा है! ⚡ जापान में अब ऐसी पाइज़ोइलेक्ट्रिक (Piezoelectric) टाइलें लगाई जा रही हैं, जो तुम्हारे हर कदम से पैदा होने वाली ऊर्जा को बिजली में बदल देती हैं! 🔋 जब लोग इन टाइलों पर चलते हैं, तो उनका वजन और हलचल टाइलों पर दबाव डालता है, जिससे टाइल हल्के से झुकती है और मैकेनिकल स्ट्रेस पैदा होता है। टाइल के अंदर मौजूद खास पदार्थ इस दबाव को इलेक्ट्रिक चार्ज में बदल देते हैं। ⚙️ हर कदम से थोड़ी-थोड़ी बिजली बनती है, लेकिन जब लाखों लोग रोज़ चलते हैं — जैसे कि टोक्यो के शिबुया स्टेशन पर (जहाँ रोज़ 24 लाख से ज़्यादा कदम पड़ते हैं!) — तो इतनी ऊर्जा बन जाती है कि उससे LED लाइट्स, डिस्प्ले और सेंसर तक चलाए जा सकते हैं! 💡 🌱 ये टेक्नोलॉजी दिखाती है कि भविष्य का शहर हर कदम से “चार्ज” होगा!” सोचो — अगर हमारे शहरों में भी ऐसी टाइलें लगें, तो क्या हम अपनी चाल से ही बिजली बना सकते हैं? ⚡ #जापान #तकनीक #नवाचार #ग्रीनएनर्जी #भविष्यकीतकनीक #ज्ञान #आपजानतेहैंक्या #टेकफैक्ट्स #सस्टेनेबलएनर्जी #इन्वेंशन #ट्रेंडिंग 日本利用压电瓷砖将脚步转化为电能。这些瓷砖捕捉来自你脚步的动能。当你行走时，你的重量和动作会对瓷砖产生压力。瓷砖会轻微弯曲，从而产生机械应力。瓷砖内部的压电材料将这种应力转化为电能。每一步都会产生少量电荷，而数百万步结合在一起就能产生足够的电力来驱动 LED 灯、数字显示屏和传感器。在像涩谷车站这样繁忙的地方，每天大约有 240 万个脚步为这一系统作出贡献。这些电能可以被储存或立即使用，从而减少对传统电力来源的依赖，并支持可持续的城市基础设施。这种方法将日常运动转化为实用的可再生能源 #日本 #知识 #事实 #你知道吗 #推荐 #科技 #创新 #历史 #技术 #实验 #热门 日本利用压电瓷砖将脚步转化为电能。这些瓷砖捕捉来自你脚步的动能。当你行走时，你的重量和动作会对瓷砖产生压力。瓷砖会轻微弯曲，从而产生机械应力。瓷砖内部的压电材料将这种应力转化为电能。每一步都会产生少量电荷，而数百万步结合在一起就能产生足够的电力来驱动 LED 灯、数字显示屏和传感器。在像涩谷车站这样繁忙的地方，每天大约有 240 万个脚步为这一系统作出贡献。这些电能可以被储存或立即使用，从而减少对传统电力来源的依赖，并支持可持续的城市基础设施。这种方法将日常运动转化为实用的可再生能源 #日本 #知识 #事实 #你知道吗 #推荐 #科技 #创新 #历史 #技术 #实验 #热门 日本利用压电瓷砖将脚步转化为电能。这些瓷砖捕捉来自你脚步的动能。当你行走时，你的重量和动作会对瓷砖产生压力。瓷砖会轻微弯曲，从而产生机械应力。瓷砖内部的压电材料将这种应力转化为电能。每一步都会产生少量电荷，而数百万步结合在一起就能产生足够的电力来驱动 LED 灯、数字显示屏和传感器。在像涩谷车站这样繁忙的地方，每天大约有 240 万个脚步为这一系统作出贡献。这些电能可以被储存或立即使用，从而减少对传统电力来源的依赖，并支持可持续的城市基础设施。这种方法将日常运动转化为实用的可再生能源 #日本 #知识 #事实 #你知道吗 #推荐 #科技 #创新 #历史 #技术 #实验 #热门

𝙈𝙧_𝘼𝙧𝙘𝙖𝙣𝙪𝙢_𝙋𝙚𝙣𝙪𝙢𝙗𝙧𝙖~ sent an attachment.
Tag your friends.🫂 s4mir_ed 日本确实有利用压电瓷砖技术,它通过压电效应将行走产生的动能转化为电能, 当人们走在瓷砖上时,脚步的压力和动作会压缩瓷砖,从而产生电流来为照明、 显示屏等设备供电。这种技术利用了“压电效应”,即某些材料在受到机械应力时会产生电荷的物理现象。 工作原理: 压电效应:压电瓷砖内部含有压电材料,当外部压力作用于这些材料时,会引起材料内部的电荷重新分布,从而产生电压和电流。 167 能量捕获:在人行道或公共场所铺设这种瓷砖,行人的脚步会不断地对瓷砖施加压力,将脚步的动能转化为电能。 能量利用:产生的电能可以用于给地板下的灯光、显示屏、传感器等小型电子设备供电,实现自给自足或补充能源。一 363 应用场景和优势: 节能减排: 这种技术是一种可持续的能源解决方案,能捕获原本浪费的动能,减少对传统能源的依赖。 智能城市:在日本及其他国家,这种技术已被用于公共场所,如火车站、商场、 公园等,为这些场所的照明、信息显示等提供电力,是构建智能城市的一部分。 增强互动性:有些压电地板还会设计成在人走过时改变灯光颜色或亮度,增加空间的功能性和趣味性。 100k

𝙈𝙧_𝘼𝙧𝙘𝙖𝙣𝙪𝙢_𝙋𝙚𝙣𝙪𝙢𝙗𝙧𝙖~

𝙈𝙧_𝘼𝙧𝙘𝙖𝙣𝙪𝙢_𝙋𝙚𝙣𝙪𝙢𝙗𝙧𝙖~ sent an attachment.
日本利用压电瓷砖将脚步转化为电能。这些瓷砖捕捉来自你脚步的动能。当你行走时，你的重量和动作会对瓷砖产生压力。瓷砖会轻微弯曲，从而产生机械应力。瓷砖内部的压电材料将这种应力转化为电能。每一步都会产生少量电荷，而数百万步结合在一起就能产生足够的电力来驱动 LED 灯、数字显示屏和传感器。在像涩谷车站这样繁忙的地方，每天大约有 240 万个脚步为这一系统作出贡献。这些电能可以被储存或立即使用，从而减少对传统电力来源的依赖，并支持可持续的城市基础设施。这种方法将日常运动转化为实用的可再生能源 #日本 #知识 #事实 #你知道吗 #推荐 #科技 #创新 #历史 #技术 #实验 #热门

You sent an attachment.
Jamol musulmon - bu yosh va iqtidorli nemis futbolchisi, hozirda "Bavariya" va Germaniya terma jamoasi uchun o'ynaydi. 2003 yil 26 fevralda tug'ilgan musiyid - bu hujumkor yarim himoyachi va vinger, uning o'ziga xos dribling, ijod va to'pni yopishgani uchun taniqli. Uning tezkor oyog'i, ko'rish qobiliyati va himoyachilarning o'tishi qobiliyati uni dunyo futboli tubidagi eng hayajonli yosh o'yinchilardan biriga aylantiradi. "Chelsi" akademiyasida 2009 yilda "" Chelsi "akademiyasida ishlab chiqilgan. O'shandan beri u nemis gigantlari uchun asosiy o'yinchiga aylandi, ularning ichki va Evropadagi muvaffaqiyatlarida hal qiluvchi rol o'ynaydi. Uning terma jamoasi uchun chiqishlari ham juda ta'sirli bo'lib, Germaniya kelajagining muhim qismi bo'lishi kutilmoqda. #JamalMusiala #Bayern Munich #German Football #YoungTalent #FutureStar #Bundesliga #Football Magic #Germany NationalTeam #MusialaMagic

𝚈𝚊𝚜𝚑𝚊𝚗𝚜𝚑

You sent an attachment.
Rapid revision of class 10th power sharing Ab to padh lo😀Power sharing is an essential feature of democracy because it helps to prevent the concentration of power in one hand. When power is shared among different organs and groups, it reduces the chances of conflict and misuse of authority. In Belgium, power sharing was practiced by giving equal representation to both French and Dutch-speaking communities. This helped maintain peace in a diverse society. In contrast, Sri Lanka ignored the demands of the Tamil population, leading to civil war and violence. Thus, power sharing is a way to ensure stability in a country. It is based on the principle that people are the source of all political power. In modern democracies, power is shared among the Legislature, Executive, and Judiciary. This is known as horizontal distribution of power. Similarly, power is also divided vertically among central, state, and local governments. In India, this is called federalism. Power is also shared among different political parties, especially through coalition governments. This prevents one party from becoming too dominant. Social groups like religious and linguistic minorities also get a share in power to protect their interests. Such arrangements make democracy more inclusive. Power sharing brings unity in diversity by respecting every community. It promotes the spirit of cooperation and understanding among citizens. It reduces the possibility of dictatorship. It also deepens the roots of democracy by encouraging participation. In short, power sharing is the true essence of democratic governance. Credit to:padhlein

Send to your bro 💝🤝 . . . . . .In today's edition of #10Things, spend a cozy fall day at home in London with actress @yazdemand (Yasmin Finney) reading scripts, strolling through the park with her dog Koko and making a warm cup of tea (with four scoops of sugar, no less) "My favorite thing about London would be the electricity I get from walking the streets and seeing everyone's individuality," says Yasmin. "I just feel like I fit in perfectly." Yasmin, who plays the character Elle in "Heartstopper” on @netflixuk also reflected on her experience filming Season 3, which released . . . . #happy #quoteoftheday #aesthetic #aesth etic #smile #Mofiandchill #bollyvwoodsongs #recoverysayings #bestedits #reelstofeel #reelsquotes #reelsinstagram #reelaesthetic #a e S theti c #instareels #instawriteups #quotesoftheday #reelstoday #favourite #trending #relatable #viralvideos #viralreels #foryou #reelsinstagram #instamusic #instagram #quotes #bromance #bros

#🔨ᴿᵉᵃᵈʸ ᵗᵒ ᵇᵘᶦˡᵈ ᵗʰᵉ ᶠᵒᵘⁿᵈᵃᵗᶦᵒⁿ ᵒᶠ ʸᵒᵘʳ ᵃᶜᵗᶦⁿᵍ ᶜʳᵃᶠᵗ? ᴶᵒᶦⁿ ᵘˢ ᶦⁿ-ᵖᵉʳˢᵒⁿ ᵃᵗ ᵒᵘʳ ᴸᵒˢ ᴬⁿᵍᵉˡᵉˢ ˢᵗᵘᵈᶦᵒ ᶠᵒʳ ᵗʰᵉ ⁶-ᵂᵉᵉᵏ ᴬᶜᵗᶦⁿᵍ ᵀᵉᶜʰⁿᶦᵠᵘᵉ ᵖʳᵒᵍʳᵃᵐ, ᵗʰᵉ ᵉˢˢᵉⁿᵗᶦᵃˡ ᶠᶦʳˢᵗ ˢᵗᵉᵖ ᶠᵒʳ ᵃˡˡ ˢᵗᵘᵈᵉⁿᵗˢ ᵃᵗ ᵗʰᵉ ˢᵗᵘᵈᶦᵒ.🌟 ᴵⁿ ᵗʰᶦˢ ᶜᵒᵐᵖʳᵉʰᵉⁿˢᶦᵛᵉ ᶜᵒᵘʳˢᵉ, ʸᵒᵘ’ˡˡ ᵉˣᵖˡᵒʳᵉ: 🔹• ᴴᵒʷᵃʳᵈ ᶠᶦⁿᵉ’ˢ ˢᶜʳᶦᵖᵗ ᴬⁿᵃˡʸˢᶦˢ ᴸᵉᶜᵗᵘʳᵉ 🔹• ᵁᵗᵃ ᴴᵃᵍᵉⁿ’ˢ ᴼᵇʲᵉᶜᵗ ᴱˣᵉʳᶜᶦˢᵉˢ 🔹• ᴾᵉʳˢᵒⁿᵃˡᶦᶻᵃᵗᶦᵒⁿ, ˢᵉⁿˢᵒʳʸ ʷᵒʳᵏ, ᵃⁿᵈ ᵉᵐᵒᵗᶦᵒⁿᵃˡ ʳᵉᶜᵃˡˡ ʷᶦᵗʰ ᴰᵃᵛᶦᵈ ᶜᵒᵘʳʸ 🔹• ᴴᵒʷ ᵗᵒ ʰᵃⁿᵈˡᵉ ⁿᵉʳᵛᵉˢ ᵃⁿᵈ ᵇʳᵉᵃᵏ ᵒˡᵈ ʰᵃᵇᶦᵗˢ 🔹• ᴬˢˢᶦᵍⁿᵉᵈ ᵐᵃᵗᵉʳᶦᵃˡ ᵃⁿᵈ ᵃⁿ ᶦⁿᵗʳᵒ ᵗᵒ ˢᶜᵉⁿᵉ ˢᵗᵘᵈʸ ᵀʰᶦˢ ᶜᵒᵘʳˢᵉ ᵍᵒᵉˢ ᵇᵉʸᵒⁿᵈ ᵃᵘᵈᶦᵗᶦᵒⁿ ᵖʳᵉᵖ, ᶠᵒᶜᵘˢᶦⁿᵍ ᵒⁿ ᵗʰᵉ ᵉⁿᵗᶦʳᵉ ᶜʳᵃᶠᵗ ᵒᶠ ᵃᶜᵗᶦⁿᵍ ᵗᵒ ʰᵉˡᵖ ʸᵒᵘ ⁿᵒᵗ ᵒⁿˡʸ ᵇᵒᵒᵏ ᵗʰᵉ ʲᵒᵇ ᵇᵘᵗ ⁿᵃᶦˡ ᵗʰᵉ ʳᵒˡᵉ ᵒⁿ ˢᵉᵗ ᵒʳ ˢᵗᵃᵍᵉ.🎥 📚ᴿᵉᵠᵘᶦʳᵉᵈ ᵀᵉˣᵗˢ: 🔹• ᴬ ᶜʰᵃˡˡᵉⁿᵍᵉ ᶠᵒʳ ᵗʰᵉ ᴬᶜᵗᵒʳ ᵇʸ ᵁᵗᵃ ᴴᵃᵍᵉⁿ 🔹• ᶠᶦⁿᵉ ᴼⁿ ᴬᶜᵗᶦⁿᵍ: ᴬ ⱽᶦˢᶦᵒⁿ ᵒᶠ ᵗʰᵉ ᶜʳᵃᶠᵗ ᵇʸ ᴴᵒʷᵃʳᵈ ᶠᶦⁿᵉ ᴮᵉ ˢᵘʳᵉ ᵗᵒ ᵍʳᵃᵇ ʸᵒᵘʳ ᵇᵒᵒᵏˢ ᵇᵉᶠᵒʳᵉ ᵗʰᵉ ᶠᶦʳˢᵗ ᶜˡᵃˢˢ ᵃⁿᵈ ˢᵗᵃʳᵗ ʳᵉᵃᵈᶦⁿᵍ ᴴᵒʷᵃʳᵈ’ˢ ᵇᵒᵒᵏ ᵗᵒ ᵈᶦᵛᵉ ᶦⁿᵗᵒ ᵗʰᶦˢ ᵗʳᵃⁿˢᶠᵒʳᵐᵃᵗᶦᵒⁿᵃˡ ᵉˣᵖᵉʳᶦᵉⁿᶜᵉ.📖 ➡️ᶜˡᵃˢˢ ᵇᵉᵍᶦⁿˢ ᴼᶜᵗᵒᵇᵉʳ ¹⁵ᵗʰ ᵃᵗ ¹⁰ ᵃᵐ ᴾᵀ ˢᵉᶜᵘʳᵉ ʸᵒᵘʳ ˢᵖᵒᵗ ᵗᵒᵈᵃʸ #trendingreels #reels #instagram #followforfollowback #viralvideos #love #love #viral #fun #darkmemes #funny #funnyvideos #funnymemes #meme #meme #memesdaily
